channel.title: Reinforcement Learning on Kaiwen Che
channel.description: Recent content in Reinforcement Learning on Kaiwen Che

item.title: Can Coding Agents Learn Editorial Taste with RLVR?
item.description: Training a Qwen3-14B resume revision agent with RLVR and an LLM judge. Tool mastery comes fast, content quality learns slow, and the rubric tensions reveal what reward design really means for creative domains.
